The deputy transported Hernandez to the jail.

Hernandez responded: "No I’ll have my—I’ll call my lawyer as soon as I leave from here."

note: Word-order defect in paragraph 17 where 'counterclaim' and 'lacked' have swapped semantic positions, disrupting sentence structure: DB reads '...the lacked...counterclaim interference...' instead of PDF's '...the counterclaim lacked...interference...'. Suggests text-extraction word-reordering at column/line-break boundary.

evidence: Database contains literal ASCII characters '^' (0x5e) and 'L' (0x4c) where the authoritative PDF source has form feed (0x0c) character. pdftotext extraction shows \x0c at byte 935 in source; database shows 0x5e 0x4c at byte 795. Form feed is the correct page separator control character used by the PDF; the literal ^L is a mishandling of this during OCR/text extraction.
